function.name: submit_final_code
function.arguments:
{"code":"def get_default_error_profile():
    """
    Returns the default error probability distribution used for deblurring Illumina sequencing data.
    The list contains 12 numeric values representing typical error rates.
    """
    # The required list of values
    profile = [1, 0.06, 0.02, 0.02, 0.01, 0.005, 0.005, 0.005, 0.001, 0.001, 0.001, 0.0005]
    # Return a copy to ensure two consecutive calls return equal but not identical lists
    return list(profile)
"}
